scores.correctness_notes: Agent only mentions CertificateAvailableEvent and misses CertificateDeniedEvent entirely. Also misses the revocation trigger and request_errors/error codes described in the gold standard. Describes a v4 declarative API pattern rather than the v1 contract (CSR lists, databags, provider/requirer roles).
scores.hallucination_notes: Agent describes TLSCertificatesRequiresV4 with renewal_relative_time (range 0.5-1.0), renew_certificate(), regenerate_private_key(), sync(), and refresh_events — these appear to be v4-specific APIs that may exist but cannot be verified against the gold standard which covers v1. The 90% renewal threshold and configurability claims are unverified. Minor risk of inaccuracy rather than outright fabrication.
